How MediGoCR works

From booking to consult in four steps

1

Pick a specialist

Choose your specialty and a licensed Costa Rican professional.

2

Choose your time

Pick a date & slot. We auto-translate it to your timezone.

3

Get your Google Meet

A video room & calendar invite are generated instantly.

4

Pay & confirm

Pay by SINPE, PayPal, transfer or crypto and confirm with your reference.

Demo build: emails, the live Google Meet room and payment verification are simulated in this prototype. In production these run on AWS (SES + Google Calendar API + a payment-reconciliation service). The calendar link above is real and will save the event to your account.

Medical tourism

Heal where Costa Rica breathes

Pair your treatment with a recovery stay in four of the country's most restorative corners.

Featured partner · Dine & Stay

Tierras Gosén

Nature, flavor & Costa Rican soul.

Our flagship wellness-and-tourism base in Carrizal de Alajuela — minutes from the legendary Poás Volcano. Farm-fresh Costa Rican cuisine, cool highland air, and panoramic volcanic-and-cloud-forest views make it the perfect place for our patients to rest, reconnect and recover.

Poás Volcano & cloud-forest views
Fresh local gastronomy
Nature lodging & rooms
Guided bird-watching tours
Carrizal, Alajuela, Costa Rica Fri–Sun · 8:00–18:00 +506 7214 1941
